code:
%%{Retail_CouponSystem}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-03.01 — Proposal Lifecycle (Retail_CouponSystem)

[Retail_CouponSystem] --> DRAFT : ProposalCreated (Retail_CustomerLoyalty)
note right of DRAFT
  Authoring & validation:
  • proposalId assigned
  • schema/policy checks
end note

DRAFT --> REVIEW : SubmittedForReview
note right of REVIEW
  Guard reviews (Retail_Inventory)
  Can request changes or reject
end note

REVIEW --> DRAFT : ChangesRequested
REVIEW --> REJECTED : RejectedAtReview
REVIEW --> OPEN_FOR_VOTE : ApprovedForVoting (Retail_CouponSystem)

OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> OPEN_FOR_VOTE : VoteCast (Retail_Inventory)
OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> TALLYING : VotingClosed

TALLYING --> DECIDED_APPROVED : VoteTallied → Approved (Retail_Inventory)
TALLYING --> DECIDED_REJECTED : VoteTallied → Rejected (Retail_PointOfSale)

DECIDED_APPROVED --> EXECUTION : DecisionRecorded (Retail_OrderManagement)
DECIDED_REJECTED --> ARCHIVED : DecisionRecorded (Retail_PointOfSale)

EXECUTION --> EXECUTED : PolicyChanged / GrantApproved / ProjectApproved (Retail_Inventory)
EXECUTION --> EXECUTION_FAILED : ExecutionFailed

EXECUTION_FAILED --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (Retail_CouponSystem)
EXECUTION_FAILED --> RETRY_EXEC : RetryAuthorized
RETRY_EXEC --> EXECUTION : ReExecute

EXECUTED --> AUDIT : ExecutionCompleted
AUDIT --> ARCHIVED : AuditLogged (Retail_OrderManagement)

%% Appeals (Retail_OrderManagement)
OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (Retail_CouponSystem)
DECIDED_APPROVED --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (Retail_CustomerLoyalty)
DECIDED_REJECTED --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (Retail_Inventory)

APPEAL --> DECIDED_APPROVED : AppealResolved → uphold
APPEAL --> DECIDED_REJECTED : AppealResolved → overturn
APPEAL --> ARCHIVED : AppealWithdrawn

%% Cancellations
DRAFT --> CANCELLED : WithdrawnByAuthor
OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> CANCELLED : CancelledByAuthority
CANCELLED --> ARCHIVED : Archived

%% Terminal states
REJECTED --> [Retail_OrderManagement]
ARCHIVED --> [Retail_CouponSystem]

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class DRAFT,REVIEW,OPEN_FOR_VOTE,TALLYING,DECIDED_APPROVED,DECIDED_REJECTED,EXECUTION,EXECUTED,EXECUTION_FAILED,RETRY_EXEC,APPEAL,AUDIT,ARCHIVED,REJECTED,CANCELLED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为零售优惠券系统（Retail_CouponSystem）设计一个提案生命周期状态图。核心流程是从提案创建到最终归档的完整路径。
明白。我理解为这是一个优惠券提案的审批流程。起点是DRAFT状态，由Retail_CustomerLoyalty触发创建。我需要确认：DRAFT阶段是否包含作者编写和策略校验？
对，DRAFT阶段要分配proposalId，做schema和policy检查。我会在旁边加注释说明。
好的，我已添加DRAFT状态及其右侧注释。现在从DRAFT提交后进入REVIEW状态，由Retail_Inventory负责审核，对吗？
是的。REVIEW阶段审核员可以要求修改、直接拒绝，或者批准进入投票。如果要求修改，要回到DRAFT；拒绝则进入REJECTED终态。
已添加REVIEW的三个出口。另外我在REVIEW右侧加了注释，说明这是Guard审核阶段。批准投票的触发事件是ApprovedForVoting？
没错，ApprovedForVoting事件触发后进入OPEN_FOR_VOTE。这个状态比较特殊，投票期间可以持续接收VoteCast事件，状态保持不变。
理解，这是自循环转换。投票结束后进入TALLYING计票状态。然后有两个结果分支：通过和拒绝，分别对应DECIDED_APPROVED和DECIDED_REJECTED？
对。通过是由Retail_Inventory触发的VoteTallied → Approved，拒绝是Retail_PointOfSale触发的VoteTallied → Rejected。这两个决定状态都要记录决策。
已添加计票和决策状态。DECIDED_APPROVED进入EXECUTION执行阶段，DECIDED_REJECTED直接归档。执行阶段涉及Retail_OrderManagement？
是的，EXECUTION由Retail_OrderManagement触发DecisionRecorded进入。执行成功有三种可能：PolicyChanged、GrantApproved或ProjectApproved，都进入EXECUTED。
注意到EXECUTED的触发系统写的是Retail_Inventory，不是OrderManagement。另外执行失败要进入EXECUTION_FAILED，然后可以重试或申诉？
对，执行失败有两个出路：申诉（APPEAL，由Retail_CouponSystem触发AppealOpened）或授权重试（RETRY_EXEC）。重试后回到EXECUTION重新执行。
已添加执行失败的分支。执行成功进入AUDIT审计状态，然后由Retail_OrderManagement触发AuditLogged后归档。
现在需要补充申诉机制。APPEAL不是只有执行失败才能发起——在OPEN_FOR_VOTE、DECIDED_APPROVED、DECIDED_REJECTED这三个状态都可以打开申诉。
确认一下触发系统：投票阶段申诉是Retail_CouponSystem，已批准申诉是Retail_CustomerLoyalty，已拒绝申诉是Retail_Inventory？
正确。申诉结果有三种：维持原判回到DECIDED_APPROVED，推翻原判回到DECIDED_REJECTED，或者申诉人主动撤回进入ARCHIVED。
已添加完整的申诉流程。还需要补充取消机制吗？比如作者主动撤回？
对，需要两个取消路径。DRAFT阶段作者可以WithdrawnByAuthor直接取消；OPEN_FOR_VOTE阶段权威机构可以CancelledByAuthority取消。都进入CANCELLED状态。
已添加取消路径。CANCELLED最终也要Archived到ARCHIVED。现在检查终态：REJECTED和ARCHIVED都是终止状态，需要连接回系统吗？
是的，REJECTED连接到Retail_OrderManagement，ARCHIVED连接回Retail_CouponSystem，表示流程闭环。
已添加终态连接。现在所有核心状态都有了，我数一下：DRAFT、REVIEW、OPEN_FOR_VOTE、TALLYING、DECIDED_APPROVED、DECIDED_REJECTED、EXECUTION、EXECUTED、EXECUTION_FAILED、RETRY_EXEC、APPEAL、AUDIT、ARCHIVED、REJECTED、CANCELLED，共15个状态。需要统一样式吗？
对，所有状态都用core样式：橙色填充、深灰边框、白色粗体字。这样视觉上能区分状态和注释。
已应用core样式到全部15个状态。我注意到TALLYING状态在代码里写的是TALLYING，但之前对话我可能简写了，确认拼写正确。
等等，你刚才说的TALLYING拼写没问题，但我发现之前第10回合你提到DECIDED_REJECTED直接归档，但代码里应该是DecisionRecorded事件触发，我需要确认这个事件名称是否统一。
检查过了，DECIDED_APPROVED和DECIDED_REJECTED都是DecisionRecorded事件，只是触发系统不同：前者是Retail_OrderManagement，后者是Retail_PointOfSale。拼写一致。
还有一个细节：EXECUTION_FAILED到RETRY_EXEC的转换，事件是RetryAuthorized，但重试执行回到EXECUTION的事件是ReExecute，这两个要区分开。
确认：RetryAuthorized是授权重试（进入RETRY_EXEC状态），ReExecute是实际重新执行（转换到EXECUTION）。两个事件都已正确标注。
最后确认一下标题：SM-03.01 — Proposal Lifecycle (Retail_CouponSystem)。另外起始注释用%%{Retail_CouponSystem}}}%%这种特殊格式。
标题和特殊注释已添加。完整图已生成，包含：1个起始系统连接、15个状态、约25条转换、2个注释块、申诉和取消两个子流程、以及统一的core样式。需要最终检查吗？
我快速过一遍关键路径：DRAFT→REVIEW→OPEN_FOR_VOTE→TALLYING→DECIDED_APPROVED→EXECUTION→EXECUTED→AUDIT→ARCHIVED，申诉和取消分支都覆盖到了。看起来完整，可以定稿。
定稿完成。最终状态图SM-03.01已生成，完整描述了Retail_CouponSystem的提案生命周期，包括正常审批流、投票计票、执行审计、申诉机制和取消机制。
